name: OEM International AB (publ)
summary: OEM International AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, trades in industrial components and systems. The company offers a range of industrial automation components in the areas of electrical components, machinery components and cables, pressure and flow components, motors, transmissions and brakes, appliance components, installation components, and ball bearing solutions and seals. It serves machinery and appliance manufacturing industries, wholesalers and retailers, electrical contractors, catalogue distributors, strategic end users and electronics manufacturers, and strategic contract manufacturers, as well as installation companies. The company sells its products in Sweden, Finland, the Baltic States, China, Denmark, Norway, the United Kingdom, and East Central Europe. OEM International AB (publ) is headquartered in Tran√É¬•s, Sweden.
